title: Orbit Week
description: A cinematic 3D weekly planner where each day is a planet and every task becomes a mission you can add, complete, and carry through the week.

prompt.objective: Create a planetary weekly planner with mission tasks.

mintAssets.brief: Sun, seven planets, Saturn rings, four flybys, an orbital station, and a UFO.
Venus clouds, a boiling Sun, Jupiter, and Neptune PBR maps.
Sparse deep-space backdrop with blue-violet nebula haze.

experience: Glide between planetary days with scrolling, the day rail, eased camera travel, and rare station or UFO flybys.
Manage persistent missions with live day and week progress.
prompt.visualDirection: Ink-black observatory with realistic planets, gold accents, and mission-control type.

thumbnail.alt: A glowing Sun and dark Mercury frame the Monday mission planner against a deep-space star field.

social.title: Orbit Week
social.description: A cinematic 3D weekly planner where each day is a planet and every task becomes a mission you can add, complete, and carry through the week.

image.alt: A glowing Sun and dark Mercury frame the Monday mission planner against a deep-space star field.
